name: GOLFTEC Westminster
about: GOLFTEC Westminster offers high-tech golf instruction and club fitting services. The venue utilizes advanced technology including OPTIMOTION motion tracking, high-speed video analysis, and launch monitors to provide data-driven coaching. Customers can receive personalized lesson plans and club fittings using proprietary software and equipment to improve their game. The Westminster location is part of a larger franchise that focuses on structured improvement programs with certified PGA coaches.
why_golfers_like_it: Data-driven instruction using advanced launch monitors and OPTIMOTION swing analysis
Personalized improvement plans and coaching from PGA award-winning instructors
Custom club fitting services that provide an average of 21 more yards off the tee

simulator_hardware.notes: Launch monitor used for swing data, club speed, ball speed, launch angle, and spin rate measurements

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: You can bring your own clubs, or GOLFTEC provides demo clubs for lessons and fittings. During fittings, they have top brands like Callaway, TaylorMade, and PING available for you to try.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The website does not specify a policy on outside food or drinks. Their focus is on golf instruction and training, so it appears to be a learning environment rather than a social venue.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not specify simulator play times. Their services are focused on instruction and practice, not on playing full 18-hole rounds on simulators.

faq.question: Is GOLFTEC kid-friendly?
faq.answer: GOLFTEC offers junior golf programs with technology and coaching tailored for younger players, but the website doesn't specify if there are special amenities or accommodations for children during regular lessons.
